title: Create an automation to create multiple items based on the column

posts.author: Eystar (Eman Younis)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,
I want to create an automation in which when status changes to done. It should duplicate this item but it duplicate it multiple times according to the number in another column.

Is this thing possible in Monday.com Automation as i need to create multple items from one item based on a column value in that item?

any help or guidance will be appreciated.

Thank you.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Eystar

Could this particular recipe work for you? It will require you to create a specific automation based upon each number that populates the numbers column and chose the “duplicate the item” option the amount of times that equates to the number. I understand it is a bit tedious to set up, but it does the job nonetheless:

Screen Shot 2023-03-07 at 1.42.44 pm1210×910 42.6 KB

Let me know what you think

posts.author: kdawkins (Kat Dawkins)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I want to do something similar but the function doesn’t seem to be working. Instead of being linked to a status change, I want this to function when an item is moved from one board to another and it is replicated x number of times based on a number column (see pic). However, when the item is moved to the board, nothing is replicated. Can you assist?

image1204×636 32.5 KB

Update: I’ve just tried running the automation using ‘3’ as the criteria, and instead of nothing happening, the duplication process doesn’t stop - i.e., items get continually created until I go in and turn off the automation.
